title: gymnosphaera atropurpurea
intro: Gymnosphaera atropurpurea, also known as the Purple Globe Fern or Purple Gymnosphaera, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Cyatheaceae and is native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Gymnosphaera atropurpurea include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and skin infections.
